sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47009" key="h(meroskope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμεροσκοπ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n47009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep day-watch</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
